query:
INSERT INTO sessions (device_token, session_id, project_name, status, current_tool, started_at, updated_at)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $6)
            ON CONFLICT (device_token, session_id)
            DO UPDATE SET
                project_name = COALESCE($3, sessions.project_name),
                status = $4,
                current_tool = $5,
                updated_at = $6
